resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def digitCount(self, num: str) -> bool:
        for i in range(len(num)):
            if num.count(str(i)) != int(num[i]):
                return False
        return True
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates over each character in the string, counting the occurrences of the digit represented by the character and comparing it to the character's value.
